title: Fix three Telegram bot bugs: double /setkey response, web search HackerNews fallback, /whoami duplicates
steps: Remove the 'Testing...' message from /setkey handler so only one final response is sent
Expand the time zone city map in tool_executor.cpp to include many more US cities and add DuckDuckGo fallback for generic queries
Fix /whoami duplicate responses by skipping edited_message updates and improving text extraction specificity
acceptance_criteria: /setkey sends only a single message with the test result
Time queries for cities like Fort Worth resolve to correct timezone
Generic web search queries try DuckDuckGo before returning error
edited_message updates are skipped in telegram polling
Text extraction uses more specific matching after the chat block
findings: All three bugs fixed in a single commit. The paper_trading_buy_deducts_fees test is flaky (live CoinGecko API) but unrelated to these changes.
